POL.Name: bsa_zn
POL.Comment: BEN: PSSN Fixed Basic Cash Transfer

POL.Name: bchot_zn
POL.Comment: BEN: PSSN Variable Conditional Cash Transfer (pre 2021)

POL.Name: tex_zn
POL.Comment: TAX: Excise Duty and VAT on Excise Duty items

POL.Name: neg_zn
POL.Comment: DEF: Recode negative income to zero

POL.Name: tva_tex_cbs_zn
POL.Comment: TAX: VAT and Excise Duty - Constant Budget Shares

POL.Name: bsa01_zn
POL.Comment: BEN: PSSN Variable Conditional Cash Transfer (2021 onwards)

POL.Name: xhhadj_zn
POL.Comment: DEF: Adjust consumption to new disposable income plus in-kind benefits

FUN.Name: BenCalc
FUN.Comment: Assign self-employment income to individuals who pay income tax rather than presumptive tax

FUN.Name: ArithOp
FUN.Comment: Calculate total VAT paid on standard rated items by each household

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Define income list - Standard rated items for VAT purposes (used in VAT policy)

FUN.Name: DefTu
FUN.Comment: Define tax unit - Family NOT Currently used

FUN.Name: SchedCalc
FUN.Comment: Apply presumptive tax bands to turnover income

FUN.Name: Elig
FUN.Comment: Identify individuals who must pay presumptive tax

FUN.Name: BenCalc
FUN.Comment: calculate total amount (before combining with bsa amount) of variable conditional cash transfer

FUN.Name: ArithOp
FUN.Comment: Calculate the amount of VAT paid on Tobacco Products

FUN.Name: ArithOp
FUN.Comment: Calculate Excise Duty on Tobacco Products

FUN.Name: ArithOp
FUN.Comment: Calculate the amount of VAT paid on Kerosene/paraffin

FUN.Name: ArithOp
FUN.Comment: Basic Poverty Line - indirect taxes off

FUN.Name: ArithOp
FUN.Comment: Food Poverty Line - indirect taxes on

FUN.Name: ArithOp
FUN.Comment: Food Poverty Line - indirect taxes off

FUN.Name: ArithOp
FUN.Comment: Basic Needs Poverty Line - Indirect Taxes On

FUN.Name: BenCalc
FUN.Comment: These are the adult equivalents for calorie based scale in Zanzibar

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Disposable income without imputed home produce

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Pension benefits ("Pension benefits" in Statistics Presenter)

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Disposable income accounting for in-kind benefits

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Post-fiscal disposable income without imputed home produce

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Define income list - Taxable income (used in income tax policy)(2)

FUN.Name: ArithOp
FUN.Comment: Calculate Constant Budget Shares for VAT

FUN.Name: ArithOp
FUN.Comment: Calculate Constant Budget Shares for Excise Duty

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Indirect taxes (“Indirect taxes” in Statistics Presenter)

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Social security contributions ("SSC (employer and employee)" in Statistics Presenter)

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Child benefits ("Child benefits" in Statistics Presenter)

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Social assistance benefits ("Social assistance benefits" in Statistics Presenter)

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Widows and Orphans Benefits none in Zanzibar but needed for Stats Presenter

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Disabled benefits ("Disabled benefits" in Statistics Presenter)

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Unemployment benefit ("Unemployment benefits" in Statistics Presenter)

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Disposable income with imputed home produce if appropriate (needed for Statistics Presenter - do not change)

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Simulated Consumption (needed for Statistics Presenter - do not change)

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Agricultural benefits ("Agricultural benefits" in Statistics Presenter)

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Post-fiscal simulated consumption (needed for Statistics Presenter - do not change)

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Post-fiscal income accounting for home produce if appropiate (needed for Statistics Presenter - do not change)

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Indirect subsidies (“Indirect subsidies” in Statistics Presenter)

FUN.Name: DefConst
FUN.Comment: Specify share of own-account production consumed that is protected from changes

FUN.Name: BenCalc
FUN.Comment: Switch to precisely simulate expenditures on UPS (ON by default)

PAR.Name: $kerosene_ed_rate_per_litre
PAR.Comment: Current Excise Duty Rate for kerosene/paraffin (per litre)

PAR.Name: $non_filter_cigarette_ed_rate_per_unit
PAR.Comment: Current Excise Duty Rate for non filter cigarettes (per unit)

PAR.Name: $filter_cigarette_ed_rate_per_unit
PAR.Comment: Current Excise Duty Rate for filter cigarettes (per unit)

PAR.Name: $indirect_food_povline
PAR.Comment: Food Poverty line used when indirect tax tool on in Stats Presenter

PAR.Name: $indirect_basic_povline
PAR.Comment: Basic Needs Poverty line used when indirect tax tool on in Stats Presenter

PAR.Name: Base
PAR.Comment: Schedules and Rates as checked against respective Finance Acts

PAR.Name: Formula
PAR.Comment: Now add in other icome to be taxed

PAR.Name: Comp_Cond
PAR.Comment: Take into account only employed income from the formal sector

PAR.Name: Output_Var
PAR.Comment: paye income ie yem for those in formal sector

PAR.Name: i_paye
PAR.Comment: paye income ie yem for those in formal sector

PAR.Name: Formula
PAR.Comment: Calculate the amount of VAT. Constant Consumption

PAR.Name: Name
PAR.Comment: NB. zero-rated exempt items should be reclassified as n/a

PAR.Comment: Annual registration of the vehicles (technical inspection an

PAR.Name: WarnIfNoFactor
PAR.Comment: Suppress warning message relating to monetary variables without an explicitly defined uprating factor

PAR.Name: yse
PAR.Comment: Uprating factor for self-employment income (CPI was used as earnings inflator was not available) NB. use Uprating Indices

PAR.Name: yem
PAR.Comment: Uprating factor for employment income (CPI was used as earnings inflator was not available) NB. use Uprating Indices

PAR.Name: yag
PAR.Comment: Uprating factor for agricultural income (CPI was used as earnings inflator was not available) NB. use Uprating Indices

PAR.Name: Type
PAR.Comment: Unit members are defined by parameter Members

PAR.Name: PartnerCond
PAR.Comment: Default = head:idperson=idpartner i.e. one's own partner id is the same as the head's id

PAR.Name: Type
PAR.Comment: Each member of the household forms own unit

PAR.Name: Type
PAR.Comment: Unit members are defined by parameter Members

PAR.Name: PartnerCond
PAR.Comment: Default = head:idperson=idpartner i.e. one's own partner id is the same as the head's id

PAR.Name: Type
PAR.Comment: All members of the household belong to one unit

PAR.Name: Base
PAR.Comment: This is the tax base for presumptive tax, for those who fulfill the condition above

PAR.Name: Elig_Cond
PAR.Comment: Individual must have turnover from self-employment/business that is less than the upper limit and must not also be engaged in employment/other activity

PAR.Name: Output_Var
PAR.Comment: Total bsa amount for adult and child

PAR.Name: Elig_Cond
PAR.Comment: Must be in receipt of FBCT and have children

PAR.Name: Output_Var
PAR.Comment: households in receipt of FBCT and containing one or more children

PAR.Name: Output_Var
PAR.Comment: children aged 7-13 inclusive are assigned their BSA amount

PAR.Name: Output_Var
PAR.Comment: the BSA amount for children aged 7-13 is capped

PAR.Name: Output_Var
PAR.Comment: children aged 14-17 are assigned their BSA amount

PAR.Name: Output_Var
PAR.Comment: the BSA amount for children aged 14-17 is capped

PAR.Name: UpLim
PAR.Comment: for a maximum of three children

PAR.Name: Output_Var
PAR.Comment: children under 7 are assigned their BSA amount

PAR.Name: Output_Var
PAR.Comment: the BSA amount for children under 7 is capped

PAR.Name: i_bsa_hh_with_ch
PAR.Comment: households in receipt of FBCT and containing one or more children

PAR.Name: i_bsa_ch14_17_capped
PAR.Comment: the VCCT amount for children aged 14-17 is capped

PAR.Name: i_bsa_hh_with_ch_14_17
PAR.Comment: children aged 14-17 are assigned their VCCT amount

PAR.Name: i_bsa_ch7_13_capped
PAR.Comment: the VCCT amount for children aged 7-13 is capped

PAR.Name: i_bsa_hh_with_ch_7_13
PAR.Comment: children aged 7-13 inclusive are assigned their VCCT amount

PAR.Name: i_bsa_chunder7_capped
PAR.Comment: the VCCT amount for children under 7 is capped

PAR.Name: i_bsa_hh_with_chunder7
PAR.Comment: children under 7 are assigned their VCCT amount

PAR.Name: Formula
PAR.Comment: Calculate the amount of VAT paid Tobacco Products

PAR.Name: Output_Add_Var
PAR.Comment: Amount paid in VAT onTobacco Products

PAR.Name: Formula
PAR.Comment: Quantity of filter and non filter Cigarettes units* duty rate in Tsh

PAR.Name: Output_Var
PAR.Comment: This is the Excise Duty on tobacco products

PAR.Name: Formula
PAR.Comment: Calculate the amount of VAT paid on Kerosene/paraffin

PAR.Name: Output_Add_Var
PAR.Comment: Amount paid in VAT on Kerosene/paraffin

PAR.Name: Formula
PAR.Comment: Quantity of Kerosene/paraffin in Litres * duty rate in Tsh

PAR.Name: Output_Var
PAR.Comment: This is the Excise Duty on Kerosene/paraffinl

PAR.Name: ils_ben
PAR.Comment: Simulated Benefits plus non sim Benefits in Original Data Set

PAR.Name: ils_pen
PAR.Comment: Pension benefits ("Pension benefits" in Statistics Presenter)

PAR.Name: bsa01_s
PAR.Comment: PSSN Variable Conditional Cash Transfer 2021 onwards

PAR.Name: Name
PAR.Comment: None in Zanzibar except ZUPS but this is in ils_pen

PAR.Name: ils_dispy
PAR.Comment: Disposable income without imputed home produce

PAR.Name: ils_dispy
PAR.Comment: Disposable income without imputed home produce

PAR.Name: ils_taxco
PAR.Comment: Indirect taxes (“Indirect taxes” in Statistics Presenter)

PAR.Name: x0123
PAR.Comment: Tea, maté and other plant products for infusion (ND)

PAR.Name: x0119
PAR.Comment: Ready-made food and other food products n.e.c. (ND)

PAR.Name: x0117
PAR.Comment: Vegetables, tubers, plantains, cooking bananas and pulses (ND)

PAR.Name: x0114
PAR.Comment: Milk, other dairy products and eggs (ND)

PAR.Name: x0112
PAR.Comment: Live animals, meat and other parts of slaughtered land animals (ND)

PAR.Name: x0130
PAR.Comment: Services for processing primary goods for food and non-alcoholic beverages (S)

PAR.Name: x056
PAR.Comment: Goods and services for routine household maintenance

PAR.Name: x055
PAR.Comment: Tools and equipment for house and garden

PAR.Name: x044
PAR.Comment: Water supply and miscellaneous services relating to the dwelling

PAR.Name: x043
PAR.Comment: Maintenance, repair and security of the dwelling

PAR.Name: Name
PAR.Comment: NB ils_bch ils_bsa ils_bsu ils_bdi ils_bag ils_bun ils_pen all mutually exclusive

PAR.Name: Name
PAR.Comment: NB ils_bch ils_bsa ils_bsu ils_bdi ils_bag ils_bun ils_pen all mutually exclusive

PAR.Name: bsa01_s
PAR.Comment: PSSN Variable Conditional Cash Transfer 2021 onwards

PAR.Name: Name
PAR.Comment: NB ils_bch ils_bsa ils_bsu ils_bdi ils_bun ils_pen all mutually exclusive

PAR.Name: Name
PAR.Comment: NB ils_bch ils_bsa ils_bsu ils_bdi ils_bun ils_pen all mutually exclusive

PAR.Name: xhh_s
PAR.Comment: Adjusted consumption by difference between disposable income incl. in-kind benefits in current and base year

PAR.Name: Name
PAR.Comment: NB ils_bch ils_bsa ils_bsu ils_bdi ils_bun ils_pen all mutually exclusive

PAR.Name: $protect_cons
PAR.Comment: An optional constant for the share of own-account production consumed that is protected from the shock. This is ca. 25% in Sub-Saharan Africa, but can be set to 0%.

PAR.Name: Comp_Cond
PAR.Comment: Disposable income incl. in-kind benefits higher than in base year

PAR.Name: Comp_perTU
PAR.Comment: ... increase by change in disposable income incl. in-kind benefits

PAR.Name: Comp_perTU
PAR.Comment: ... decrease by change in disposable income incl. in-kind benefits

PAR.Name: Comp_Cond
PAR.Comment: Disposable income incl. in-kind benefits smaller than in base year

PAR.Name: Comp_Cond
PAR.Comment: Based on 2024/2025 data. Update in other years if data is available

PAR.Name: Comp_Cond
PAR.Comment: Applied to formal workers; in 2023 - only public sector employees.

PAR.Name: Comp_Cond
PAR.Comment: Applied to formal workers; in 2023 - only public sector employees.

PAR.Name: #_Amount
PAR.Comment: Actual price. If announced price exceeds actual price (see country report), we set actual price = announced price. For 2024, we assume actual price = announced price.

PAR.Name: #_Amount
PAR.Comment: Actual price. If announced price exceeds actual price (see country report), we set actual price = announced price. For 2024, we assume actual price = announced price.

PAR.Name: #_Amount
PAR.Comment: Actual price. If announced price exceeds actual price (see country report), we set actual price = announced price. For 2025, we assume actual price = announced price = announced in 2024.

EXTENSION.Name: Constant Budget Share for VAT and Excise
